issues.issue: The stored description is '<!--GITHUB_BLOCK-->' — a raw HTML/markdown comment artifact, not a real description. It says nothing about what the component does.
issues.suggestion: A multi-line text input control that extends BaseInputControlProps with additional props for rows, minRows, maxRows, and a note element.

issues.issue: The stored description is '<!--GITHUB_BLOCK-->' — a raw HTML/markdown comment artifact, not a real description. It says nothing about what the component does.
issues.suggestion: A single-line text input control that extends BaseInputControlProps with additional props for type, label, startContent, endContent, and a note element.

issues.issue: The description claims the component 'accepts only text content', but the source shows a floating tooltip built on @floating-ui/react whose content prop is not restricted to plain text. The description also does not mention configurable triggers (hover/focus), delay, placement, offset, or portal support.
issues.suggestion: A floating tooltip built on @floating-ui/react that attaches to its child node as an anchor. Supports hover and focus triggers, configurable open/close delay, placement, offset, and portal rendering.

issues.issue: The description is null — the component has no description at all in the data JSON.
issues.suggestion: A tree-structured select dropdown that combines TreeList, SelectControl, and SelectPopup. Supports single and multi-select, controlled open state, validation, and custom item/control rendering.

issues.issue: The description is null — the component has no description at all in the data JSON.
issues.suggestion: A virtualized scrollable list built on @tanstack/react-virtual. Supports nested children, persisted item indexes, load-more-on-scroll behavior, and the ability to disable virtualization entirely.

issues.issue: The description ('adjustable notifications also known as toasts') omits the imperative class-based API (add, remove, removeAll, update, has methods) and the withToaster HOC that injects the toaster context.
issues.suggestion: A class-based toast notification manager exposing add, remove, removeAll, update, and has methods. Also provides a withToaster HOC and useToaster hook for injecting the toaster context into components.

issues.issue: The description claims the component 'can also accept a custom React node as an avatar', but the source description only mentions it uses the Avatar component internally. This custom-ReactNode claim is not confirmed by the available source context.
issues.suggestion: A component for displaying a user avatar with an optional name and description block, using the Avatar component internally.

issues.issue: The description ('can be used to display users or user-related information') is too vague to meaningfully distinguish this component. The source shows it is a chip/label that includes an avatar, primary text, optional description, a close button, a click handler, and supports person/email/empty variants.
issues.suggestion: A chip-style label for displaying a user with an avatar, primary text, optional description, and a close button. Supports click handling and three variants: person, email, and empty.
